task:
In the Blender file open at /home/user/Documents/nla_scene.blend, on the default Cube create two actions:
- 'BounceLoc' — keyframes the Cube's Z Location to 0.0 at frame 1, 2.0 at frame 10, and 0.0 at frame 20.
- 'SpinRot' — keyframes the Cube's Z Rotation to 0.0 at frame 1 and 6.283 at frame 40.

Push each action down so the Cube's animation_data has two NLA tracks named exactly 'Bounce' (containing a strip referencing 'BounceLoc') and 'Spin' (containing a strip referencing 'SpinRot'). Names must match exactly. Save the file.

verification.eval: any(t['name']=='Bounce' and any(s.get('action')=='BounceLoc' for s in t.get('strips',[])) for t in result.get('nla_tracks',[]))
verification.description: Bounce track has strip referencing BounceLoc

verification.eval: any(t['name']=='Spin' and any(s.get('action')=='SpinRot' for s in t.get('strips',[])) for t in result.get('nla_tracks',[]))
verification.description: Spin track has strip referencing SpinRot
